AFFECT /appload/qml/window.qml
TRAVERSE ?#windowCanvas
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT {
     ~&7713532151049593&~: ~&6504254477&~.appName === "KOReader" && ~&6504254477&~.globalWidth > ~&6504254477&~.globalHeight ? -90 : 0
}
REBUILD [[7083177690781]]
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM \  ~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
                        ~&214646099849&~: windowCanvas.contentAspectRatio * ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ \
REMOVE LOCATED
INSERT STREAM \
			~&7082729686082&~: windowCanvas.~&7713532151049593&~ === 0 ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ : ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
			~&214646099849&~: windowCanvas.~&7713532151049593&~ === 0 ? windowCanvas.contentAspectRatio * ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ : windowCanvas.contentAspectRatio * ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ \
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
